description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc sanity checks that runs on push to feature/sanity-checks-for-github-ci and on pull requests to master. Run multiple GCC build jobs with different C++ standards (C++03, C++11, C++14, C++17, C++20) and STL configurations (with and without STL) on ubuntu-22.04, checking out the repository, fetching the code, setting CC and CXX to gcc and g++ respectively, configuring cmake, and running make.
